failed_attempts.sql: WITH publication_comment_ids AS (  SELECT p.publication_id, COUNT(c.id) AS comment_count  FROM publication p  JOIN comment c ON p.id = c.publication_id  WHERE lower(c.annotation) LIKE '%' || 'steakhouse' || '%' OR lower(p.description) LIKE '%' || 'steakhouse' || '%' GROUP BY p.publication_id  ), relevanceRankedCommentCounts AS (  SELECT pcid.publication_id, ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'steakhouse')) + ts_rank(b.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'steakhouse')) AS comment_relevance  FROM publication_comment_ids pcid  JOIN publication p ON pcid.publication_id = p.id  LEFT JOIN profile b ON p.profile_id = b.id ORDER BY comment_relevance DESC LIMIT 10)  SELECT ctc.comment_count AS comment_count, p.id AS profile_id, bc.num_comments + bc.num_likes / (bc.num_followers + 1) AS engagement_score FROM publication_comment_ids pcid  INNER JOIN relevanceRankedCommentCounts rrc ON pcid.publication_id = rrc.publication_id  LEFT JOIN publication p ON pcid.publication_id = p.id  LEFT JOIN profile b ON p.profile_id = b.id  LEFT JOIN (  SELECT publication_id, COUNT(id) AS num_comments, SUM(num_likes) / NULLIF(SUM(num_followers), 0) AS engagement_score FROM comment GROUP BY publication_id ) bc ON b.id = bc.publication_id;
